description: Agent-ready Bambu print monitoring with exact plate previews and start/finish payloads.

env_var_specs.name: BAMBU_SERIAL
env_var_specs.description: Bambu printer serial used for discovery filtering, MQTT topics, and certificate identity checks.

env_var_specs.name: BAMBU_ACCESS_CODE
env_var_specs.description: Local LAN access code used to authenticate directly to the printer.

tools.name: observations_list
tools.description: List locally persisted printer observations. Optional: printer, type, since. Returns array of Observation.

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by observation type such as status, transition, or job.

params.name: since
params.description: Include observations recorded within this duration or after this timestamp.
